_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: With 0 of 36 windows showing ±2+ movement and neither directional breaker present, the coil statistics dominate and HOLD wins by default until funding flips positive or VIX spikes.
next_move.brains_agree: Split — Analyst calls HOLD with medium conviction and explicit breakers; Narrative implies bullish lean with 0.79 confidence but does not explicitly call a directional entry, so the operational signal converges on HOLD while the interpretive framing diverges.
next_move.confirmed_if: Score remains in Anxiety/Complacency band (39-54) for next 2-3 readings AND either breaker triggers: funding sustainably positive with ETF flows >80 and VIX <15 (UP), or VIX >20 with DXY >102 (DOWN).
next_move.invalidated_if: Fear/Greed drops below 24 (Panic territory) OR funding spikes above 0.01% with BTC momentum clearing 65 (invalidates HOLD for initial LONG) OR VIX above 20 with DXY above 102 (invalidates HOLD for REDUCE).
